geographic_restrictions: New York State, including Long Island, Nassau, Suffolk, Westchester Counties, and the Hudson River from New York City to the Federal Dam at Troy
project_area: Coastal processes and hazards, shoreline management, flood and erosion risk mitigation, and resilient community development
demographic_requirements: Intended for local government officials, staff, volunteers, researchers, students, and stakeholders involved in coastal management and decision-making
eligibility_summary: Open to researchers, students, local government officials, staff, volunteers, and stakeholders in New York State focusing on coastal resilience, shoreline management, and flood/erosion risk mitigation. Specific resources and guides are tailored for Long Island and Hudson River regions.
